title: Erotikon
writer: Ferenc Herczeg, Gustaf Molander, Arthur Nordén
actors: Anders de Wahl, Tora Teje, Karin Molander
plot: EROTIKON surely pushed the boundaries of what was acceptable on the screen in 1920: Irene, the bored wife of a distracted entomologist, pursues a womanizing aviator, but she may actually be in love with Preben, her husband's best ...
